title: Happy Birthday My Love 💖
message: My dearest love, today the universe celebrates the most beautiful soul it ever created — you. From the moment you came into my life, every sunrise became more golden, every melody more sweet, and every heartbeat carried your name. You are the poetry I never knew I could write, the dream I never want to wake from, and the miracle I thank the stars for every single night. On this magical day, I want you to know that my love for you is deeper than the ocean, brighter than a thousand suns, and more infinite than the cosmos itself. You deserve all the happiness, all the laughter, and all the love this world has to offer. Happy Birthday, my everything. May this year bring you closer to every dream your beautiful heart desires. I love you beyond words, beyond time, beyond forever. 💕
